items.hook: Bhagya Reddy Varma, born Madari Bagaiah, was a political leader, social reformer and activist known for advocating against untouchability in Hyderabad State and for the abolition of the Jogini and Devdasi systems.
items.body: He launched the Adi-Hindu movement in the Hyderabad region of British India, beginning in 1912, and later established the Adi-Hindu Social Service League in 1924, which promoted social reform for the Depressed Classes in Nizam's Hyderabad. One of those things

items.hook: Mudunkotuwa Munasinghe Arachchige Sujatha Perera , colloquially known as Sujatha Aththanayaka, is a Sri Lankan singer.
items.body: She is a playback singer in Sinhala cinema and also in Sri Lankan and Indian Tamil cinema. Worth a quiet trip down the rabbit hole.

items.hook: Lily is a feminine given name usually derived from lily, the flower.
items.body: The name became particularly popular along with other flower names for girls during the 1800s and early 1900s. The world is stranger than it lets on.
